_comment: SantiBot Pterodactyl Egg — for gaming server panels
name: SantiBot
author: snuggs@santibot.dev
description: An open-source Discord bot combining NadekoBot and Dyno features. Includes music, moderation, economy, games, XP, and a full web dashboard.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
apt-get update
apt-get install -y curl unzip

# Download latest release
LATEST=$(curl -s https://api.github.com/repos/iSnuggs/SantiBot/releases/latest | grep -oP '"tag_name": "\K(.*)(?=")')
ARCH=$(uname -m)
if [ "$ARCH" = "aarch64" ]; then
  RUNTIME="linux-arm64"
else
  RUNTIME="linux-x64"
fi

curl -L -o /tmp/santibot.tar.gz "https://github.com/iSnuggs/SantiBot/releases/download/${LATEST}/santi-${RUNTIME}.tar.gz"
tar -xzf /tmp/santibot.tar.gz -C /mnt/server/ --strip-components=1
rm /tmp/santibot.tar.gz
chmod +x /mnt/server/SantiBot

# Create default creds if not exists
if [ ! -f /mnt/server/data/creds.yml ]; then
  cp /mnt/server/data/creds_example.yml /mnt/server/data/creds.yml
fi

variables.name: Owner ID
variables.description: Your Discord user ID. Right-click your name in Discord -> Copy User ID
